text: {"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>7. Denen Herren Negotianten, welche das bekannte Wechsel-Buch: <BIBL><TITLE>La Banque vendie facile anae principales Nation de lEurope</TITLE></BIBL> haben, zu wissen gethan, daß der Anthor desselben, <BIBL><AUTHOR>247. Gixauidenae</AUTHOR></BIBL>, solches mit einem dridten Supplement vermehren, auch das gantze Werck, durch Subscriptionen zum zweyten mahl drucken lassen wird, wovon das Project bey Herrn Samuel Haag dem Buchbinder zu gelben Horn am Spahlenberg zu haben, auch bey ihme zu subscribiren ist.</ITEM>","number_of_corrections":2,"explanation":"Two corrections were made: 1) The special character '√ü' (a garbled encoding) was replaced with the correct German character 'ß' in the word 'daß'. 2) A missing closing tag </BIBL> was added after </AUTHOR> to properly close the second BIBL element that was opened before the AUTHOR tag. The first BIBL block (containing TITLE) was already correctly closed."}
